description: محاولة بديلة: البحث عبر DuckDuckGo/Bing + requests لجلب بيانات difrence food
command_preview:
import asyncio, json, re
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = await browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', locale='fr-FR')
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        # 1. DuckDuckGo search
        try:
            await page.goto('https://duckduckgo.com/?q=difrence+food+oran+facebook+restaurant', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            ddg = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['duckduckgo'] = ddg[:2000]
        except Exception as e:
            r
